meaning: adj.欢天喜地的,狂喜的,销魂的
examples: Both of them burst out laughing, and Harry raptured and was at his ease.
After Gods chosen people are raptured, the antichrist will take charge of the world.
Those tinny bright red candled flowers and leaves as fine as the pine needles made me raptured.
But although these vigors correspond closely to their Raptured-based equivalents, there are new vigors to shake up your gameplay.
